textByHash.031fca97de52a1e652e763b5c25517c816ec847c: Anything for another shot at the Sharhai!
textByHash.08b5ba881d421c5e4923d798ad4f5ec20973ce6f: I won twelfth place in the Etceteria Boatswain Championships!
textByHash.2784040cd24fef13988927366de6cbf7c86f30ec: Let me know when we reach the Sharhai.
textByHash.36c4e72ff53cf9a87386ba5937d5c614edc9d6f8: Great! Don't take too long though, as I'm sure plenty of others will be wanting to try and recruit me first!
textByHash.773d69a9684853943fe8bb7d981fd25f118057c6: I mopped the deck on the fastest ship to complete the Kourend Circuit!
textByHash.991d34a4a99787b4e9da32a0686984dc0d1118a3: You don't want me doing anything so I don't show up the rest of the crew, right?
textByHash.9d09635dce5bac89824ecae41474a4ee047ad728: You don't know me? I am Bosun Zarah!
textByHash.a1b1df42fc0ab9a75352e5038804944db9c215f2: Ah, one of my fans is back! Hello!
textByHash.aa2a8b681a541ba5707466961cae8b89a30d45b5: Ha! You can't command the legendary Bosun Zarah!
textByHash.b8f01f257243ba194fc7e6bedafe1bc714af25b2: I suppose the real question is how are you enjoying having me as part of your crew?
textByHash.e42ef2e2330d8b73f205bc2ff4bbc04cf2c78b7b: I was one of only three survivors on the first ship to almost damage the Sharhai!
textByHash.f0fa68aa8ca0f8bfdfa3354ef835af46b71ef6b9: Bosun Zarah of course! Boatswain Championships... Kourend Circuit... The list is endless!
